title: OBJKT4OBJKT Summer Edition
description:
Community art-swap weekend. Mint an OBJKT, trade an OBJKT — everyone leaves with new art.

Free claims open all weekend.

title: Teia Community Call
description: Monthly all-hands: DAO updates, working group reports, open floor.

title: Tezos Pride Mint Party
description: Celebrate with the tezospride tag — group minting session and curated showcase.

title: Morning Mint Warmup — Generative June
description:
Kick off Generative June with a casual group minting session. Share your screen, mint your first piece of the month, and get feedback from the community.

All skill levels welcome — beginners encouraged.

title: DAO Working Group: Legal & Copyright
description: Open working group call covering the latest updates to Teia's copyright policy proposal, on-chain attribution discussions, and Q&A.

title: Artist AMA: Coding with p5.js on Teia
description: Live ask-me-anything with generative artist and Teia contributor blksqd. Topics: p5.js workflows, minting generative art, pricing strategy, and community feedback loops.

title: Onboarding Session: Your First NFT on Teia
description: Guided walkthrough for new creators — setting up a Tezos wallet, connecting to Teia, and minting your first piece. Volunteers on hand to help troubleshoot live.

title: Gallery Walkthrough: Tezos Landscapes
description: Curated live tour of the best landscape photography and digital art minted under #tezoslandscape. The host will spotlight five artists and open the floor for questions.

title: Charity Fundraiser Drop: Ocean Cleanup
description:
Special edition charity mint — 100% of primary sales go to Ocean Cleanup Foundation. Twenty artists have prepared exclusive pieces for this drop.

Limited editions, first come first served.

title: Collab Contract Workshop
description: Hands-on session walking through Teia's collab contract tooling — how to set up revenue splits with co-creators, what the smart contract actually does, and common pitfalls.

title: Music NFT Listening Party: Tezos Beats Vol. 3
description: Settle in and press play. We stream the newest music NFTs minted on Teia while artists share the stories behind their tracks. Chat is open for real-time reaction.

title: Critique Circle: Pixel Art Edition
description: Submit your pixel art pieces before the session starts. We'll give structured, supportive feedback on composition, palette, and storytelling. Max 8 artists per session.

title: Copyright Q&A: What Can You Mint?
description: Legal Q&A panel discussing what artists can and cannot mint on Teia — derivative works, AI-assisted art, sampling, and fair use. Community legal volunteers answer questions live.

title: Generative Art Workshop: Noise & Flow Fields
description: Intermediate workshop on Perlin noise and flow field algorithms for generative art. We'll code live in p5.js and mint the results at the end of the session.

title: Teia DAO Treasury Update Presentation
description: The core team presents the current state of the Teia DAO treasury, recent spending, runway projections, and community proposals for funding allocation.

title: Artist Spotlight: Abstract Digital Painting
description: Live studio visit with Berlin-based artist Mariana V. She shares her process for creating large-scale abstract pieces, how she prices editions, and answers audience questions.

title: Teia Accessibility Working Group Call
description: Monthly meeting of the accessibility WG — reviewing UI changes, screen reader testing results, and planning the next sprint of improvements to teia.art.

title: Open Studio: Paint & Mint
description:
Two hours of unstructured creative time. Work on whatever you like, share progress in #studio-chat, and mint anything you finish before the session ends.

No agenda, just art.

title: Tezos Ecosystem Roundup: June Week 2
description: Weekly roundtable covering news across the Tezos ecosystem — protocol updates, new marketplaces, artist milestones, and anything relevant to the Teia community.

title: Photography NFT Meetup
description: Photographers from across the Teia community meet to discuss shooting for digital collections, edition sizing for photo work, and building a collector base on Tezos.

title: Collab Drop: Community Mosaic Project
description: Thirty artists each contribute one tile to a community mosaic minted as a single collab OBJKT. Participants vote on the final composition before it goes live.

title: Beginner's Guide to Smart Contracts on Tezos
description: Educational session for artists curious about what's happening under the hood when they mint. No coding required — just a conceptual overview of how FA2 contracts work.

title: Evening Mint Party: Animation & GIF
description: Dedicated minting session for animated work — GIFs, video loops, and HTML canvas animations welcome. Share your piece as you mint and get instant community reactions.

title: Teia Curation Working Group: Open Applications
description: The curation WG reviews open applications for the featured artist programme and discusses the criteria for homepage spotlights. Observers welcome.

title: Global South Artists Meetup
description: Community space for artists from Africa, Latin America, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East — sharing experiences, challenges, and opportunities on Teia and the broader Tezos ecosystem.

title: Live Coding: Generative Typography
description: Watch and learn as artist typeform.tez codes a generative typography piece from scratch. The final output will be minted live at the end of the stream.

title: Collector Onboarding: Buying Your First NFT
description:
A session aimed at collectors new to Tezos. We cover wallet setup, funding with XTZ, browsing Teia, and making your first purchase safely.

Q&A throughout.

title: Teia Summer Festival — Opening Night
description:
Three-day summer festival on Teia kicks off tonight. Opening ceremony features live minting by five invited artists, a curated homepage takeover, and community celebrations in Discord.

Stay for the whole weekend — events run through June 19.

title: Social Media Strategy for NFT Artists
description: Panel discussion with three Teia artists on how they built their collector base through Twitter, Instagram, and Farcaster. Practical tactics and what actually works.

title: Pricing Your Art: Editions vs 1/1s
description: Community discussion on edition sizing and pricing strategies. We look at data from successful Teia drops and hear from collectors on what drives their decisions.

title: Critique Circle: 3D & Sculptural Digital Art
description: Structured critique session for 3D renders, sculptural NFTs, and spatial art. Six spots available — DM the moderator in advance to reserve a critique slot.

title: DAO Governance: Proposal Review Session
description: Community members present active governance proposals for discussion before they go to on-chain vote. Questions and amendments accepted from the floor.

title: HTML Canvas Art Workshop: Interactive NFTs
description: Learn to create interactive, browser-based NFTs using vanilla HTML canvas and JavaScript. We'll build a piece that responds to mouse movement and mint the result.

title: Mid-June Mint Party: Open Theme
description: Come as you are. Mint whatever you've been working on. The community gathers to share new work, celebrate recent sales, and enjoy each other's creativity.

title: Tezos Wallet Security for Artists
description: Practical session on keeping your Tezos wallet safe — seed phrase management, hardware wallets, phishing awareness, and what to do if you're compromised.

title: Artist AMA: Illustration & Character Design on Teia
description: Illustrator and character artist Yuki N. takes questions on her creative process, how she transitioned from freelance to NFTs, and growing an audience on Teia.

title: Teia x Tezos Commons: Ecosystem Integration Call
description: Joint call between Teia contributors and the Tezos Commons team discussing cross-ecosystem collaboration, grants, and shared infrastructure initiatives.

title: Music NFT Listening Party: Ambient & Electronic
description: An evening dedicated to ambient and electronic music NFTs on Teia. Artists drop in to introduce their tracks and answer questions about their creative and technical process.

title: Gallery Walkthrough: Teia Highlights — May Picks
description: Community curators walk through their favourite pieces minted on Teia in May. Each curator picks three works and explains what drew them in.

title: Royalty & Resale Rights: How It Works on Teia
description: Educational session on how on-chain royalties function for Teia OBJKTs, how collectors see royalty info, and what happens when pieces trade on other Tezos platforms.

title: Generative Art Live Judging: Community Picks
description: Community votes in real time on generative pieces minted during Generative June. Top three pieces win a community spotlight and Discord role badge.

title: Late Night Drop: Glitch Art Special
description: Surprise drop from ten glitch artists who have been collaborating in secret for three weeks. Pieces go live at 9 PM sharp, edition sizes revealed at mint time.

title: Teia Town Hall: Community Roadmap Discussion
description: Open town hall for the entire Teia community to weigh in on the platform roadmap for the second half of 2026 — feature priorities, community programmes, and partnership goals.

title: Drawing Marathon: 12-Hour Community Stream
description: Artists take turns at the canvas in a rolling 12-hour drawing stream. Pieces are minted live throughout the day as they're completed. Join any time.

title: Artist Talk: From Traditional to Digital — Migration Stories
description: Four artists share their journeys from traditional media (oil, watercolour, printmaking) to digital NFT work — what was lost, what was gained, and advice for others making the transition.

title: Charity Fundraiser: Mental Health & Artists
description: Collaborative charity drop supporting artist mental health resources. Fifty percent of primary sales donated to Open Path Collective. Pieces curated by the Teia community team.

title: Technical Q&A: IPFS, Metadata & Long-Term Preservation
description: Deep-dive session on how Teia stores metadata, what IPFS pinning means for your work's longevity, and what you should know to ensure your pieces survive long-term.

title: Portfolio Review: Feedback for Emerging Artists
description: Established Teia artists offer portfolio feedback to five emerging creators. Spots are allocated by lottery — enter by posting in #feedback-queue in Discord before noon on June 21.

title: Evening Social: Teia Community Hang
description: No agenda — just the community hanging out, sharing what they've been making, playing music, and celebrating the mid-point of the summer season.

title: Tezos IRL: Lisbon Artist Meetup
description:
In-person meetup for Teia and Tezos artists based in or visiting Lisbon. Informal drinks and conversation — no pitches, just people.

Venue details shared in Discord #irl-events channel.

title: Minting Masterclass: Metadata Best Practices
description: Walk through the best practices for writing OBJKT titles, descriptions, and tags to help collectors discover your work. Includes a live demo on Teia.

title: DAO Working Group: Platform Development Sprint Review
description: The dev working group shares completed items from the latest sprint, demos new features coming to teia.art, and invites community testing and bug reports.

title: Closing Week Celebration: Community Thank-You Mint
description: A special edition community thank-you drop to celebrate everyone who participated in Teia's June events programme. Minted by the community for the community — free claims for all attendees.
